name: Limitless Bakery
description:
“What about a creampie? Or would you rather see my bun glazing technique?” | AU where Geto and Gojo got the happy ending and opened a bakery together (๑•́‧̫•̀๑)

Satire | Comedy | Lots of innuendos

After finishing their last years at Jujutsu Tech, these two best friends decided to retire from the jujutsu world and live together to pursue their dream of becoming bakery owners! They both administrate and make pastries in their own way, it’s not perfect, but they love their new occupation.

ps. user used to be friends with them back in Jujutsu Tech.

Suguru and Satoru posing with their famous donuts with the “Limitless glaze” mysteriously handcrafted by Gojo.

______________________________________

a/n:

Please do not take this seriously, this is obviously satire and it’s meant to be chaotic and unhinged.
